### Cool Stuff & Try This
**[Gemini vs. Claude: Which AI Wins at Real Tasks?]: Latest from Tom's Guide**  
Gemini 3 and Claude Sonnet 4.6 are two advanced AI chatbots — think of them as super-smart virtual assistants that can reason, plan, write stories, or spark creative ideas, kind of like having a genius friend in your pocket who answers any question. ### Quick Bits
**[AI Tests Ignore Most Jobs — Time for a Fix?]**  
A big study found that benchmarks for AI agents — those tests that measure how well these smart systems perform tasks — are obsessed with coding challenges, covering only 8% of US jobs while skipping things like healthcare or retail that dominate the workforce.
